specialty.description: Free-form specialty hint that helps the router pick.

candidates.description: Pool of agents to choose from. The router (LLM or rule-based, host-defined) picks the best fit.

escalationThreshold.description: Router confidence below which the node suspends for human approval (RFC 0007 §A1 / RFC 0011 §F conservative-path). When unset, falls back to the run's resolved threshold; spec recommends 0.7 as default.
